model_io.model: Patient-derived fibroblasts, iPSCs, NPCs, cerebral organoids

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mutant IVNS1ABP dysregulates actin dynamics leading to cytokinesis failure
hypotheses.result: Confirmed: altered actin binding and polymerization in mutant cells correlate with senescence

hypotheses.result: Proposed mechanism; experimental validation pending
